rationale: The skill explicitly authorizes Bash calls to the inference.sh CLI via the `belt` binary, and related skill-install examples use `npx`. A normal search or extraction run will read local CLI authentication/config state, while `belt login` may write that state; the documented workflows also redirect outputs to JSON files in the working directory. Network use centers on inference.sh plus Tavily and Exa-backed search/extraction services, with arbitrary third-party web hosts reachable when extracting URLs or searching the public web.
